Registry / Terms / verification

verification

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #01468 · 7 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.4view ↗

all the operations for the purpose of examining and demonstrating, e.g. to testify in a court of law, the condition of a measuring instrument and to determine its metrological properties, amongst others by reference to the relevant statutory requirements 2 ACTIVITÉS DE MÉTROLOGIE LÉGALE

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.4
    all the operations for the purpose of examining and demonstrating, e.g. to testify in a court of law, the condition of a measuring instrument and to determine its metrological properties, amongst others by reference to the relevant statutory requirements 2 ACTIVITÉS DE MÉTROLOGIE LÉGALE

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIML 2022.
  2. MEDIUM 7 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

7 distinct definitions across 7 publications.

7 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102004OIML R 111-1:20042.1801468
( all the operations carried out by an organ of the national service oflegal metrology (or other legally authorized organization) having the object of ascertaining and confirming that the weight entirely satisfies the requirements of the regulations for verification. Verification includes both examination and stamping. Adapted from VIML 2.4 and 2.13)
pending
202X2004OIML R 111-1:20042.1801468
all the operations carried out by an organ of the national service of legal metrology (or other legally authorized organization) having the object of ascertaining and confirming that the weight entirely satisfies the requirements of the regulations for verification. Verification includes both examination and stamping. (Adapted from VIML 2.4 and 2.13)
pending
20102008OIML D 31:20083.1.5702224
procedure (other than type approval) that includes the examination and marking and/or issuing of a verification certificate that ascertains and confirms that the measuring instrument complies with the statutory requirements
pending
202X2016OIML R147:20161.1.502821
provision of objective evidence that a given item fulfils a specified requirement [OIML V2-200:2012; 2.44] [2] confirmation that performance properties or legal requirements of a measuring system are achieved
pending
202X2019OIML D034:20193.1.1703618
provision of objective evidence that a given item fulfils specified requirements (from VIM, 2.44)
pending
202X2023OIML D031:20233.2.7302224-D031
provision of objective evidence that a given item fulfils specified requirements [adapted from OIML V 2-200:2012, 2.44]
pending
202X2022OIML D005:20223.1003619
provision of objective evidence that a given item fulfils specified requirements [VIM, 2.44] Example 1: Confirmation that a given reference material as claimed is homogeneous for the quantity value and measurement procedure concerned, down to a measurement portion having a mass of 10 mg. Example 2: Confirmation that performence properties or legal requirements of measuring system are achived. Example 3: Confirmation that a target measurement uncertainty can be met.
pending
